FusionReactor 2026.1.3 Core API Specification

FusionReactor Core API (FRAPI)

This set of documentation contains the publicly-released API for FusionReactor

Clients of this release are permitted to use all public components of this API, except where otherwise noted.

Feedback

We welcome your questions, comments and feedback in order to improve our products and documentation.

Please send them to support@fusion-reactor.com.
